canonical_definition: A fine-tuned model variant that generates special tokens like [retrieve] or [relevant] to assess retrieval necessity and evidence relevance, serving as a baseline for knowledge checking tasks.
papers: Entity Decomposition with Filtering: A Zero-Shot Clinical Named Entity Recognition Framework
Rethinking Word Similarity: Semantic Similarity through Classification Confusion
